name: synthetic-dataflow-bigquery
description: Generate fictitious-but-realistic synthetic rows for a BigQuery table via Apache Beam + L4 GPU + Gemma 4. See docs/CICD.md.

parameters.name: ddl_uri
parameters.label: DDL JSON URI
parameters.helpText: gs:// path to the _ddl.json produced by scripts/extract_ddl.py.

parameters.name: reference_table
parameters.label: Reference table FQN
parameters.helpText: Source BigQuery table for live SELECT reference rows. project.dataset.table.

parameters.name: reference_rows_limit
parameters.label: Reference rows LIMIT
parameters.helpText: Cap on rows pulled by SELECT ... LIMIT N. Default 10000.

parameters.name: landing_table
parameters.label: Landing table FQN
parameters.helpText: Destination BigQuery table for valid synthetic rows. project.dataset.table.

parameters.name: dlq_table
parameters.label: DLQ table FQN
parameters.helpText: Destination BigQuery table for dead-lettered rows. project.dataset.table.

parameters.name: num_rows
parameters.label: Number of synthetic rows to generate

parameters.name: similarity
parameters.label: Similarity to reference (0.0–1.0)
parameters.helpText: 0=pure random within schema, 1=mimic reference closely. Default 0.5.

parameters.name: run_id
parameters.label: Run ID
parameters.helpText: Unique identifier propagated to validation_runs and reference_digest provenance.

parameters.name: engine
parameters.label: Generation engine
parameters.helpText: b1_rag (RAG over reference rows) or b2_library (CTGAN/SDV-family wrapper).

parameters.name: embedder_uri
parameters.label: Embedder URI (B.1 RAG)
parameters.helpText: gs://<bucket>/synthetic/models/embedders/<model>/<version>/ — optional; empty uses the dependency-free HashingEmbedder.

parameters.name: validation_runs_table
parameters.label: validation_runs table FQN
parameters.helpText: Destination BigQuery table for the run-level summary row. project.dataset.table. Optional; empty skips the write.

parameters.name: env
parameters.label: Environment tier
parameters.helpText: dev | uat | prd — selects the threshold tier from config/thresholds.yml.

parameters.name: client_type
parameters.label: Model client type
parameters.helpText: vllm (production), mlx (M4 local smoke), fake (CI fixture).
